items.title: Routing Guide Reliability Release
items.description: Release focused on tender acceptance, fallback coverage, and routing guide observability for enterprise shippers.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase primary and backup carrier acceptance on priority lanes.
Reduce time to secure compliant backup capacity after rejection.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce expensive late fallback and premium coverage.

productBricks.change: Add routing guide leakage diagnostics and fallback reason codes.
Improve backup carrier ranking using service and facility fit.
Add confidence bands to spot fallback recommendations.

deliveryChannels.change: Expose routing guide performance and fallback actions.

items.title: Carrier Payment Trust Release
items.description: Release focused on document first-pass validation, accessorial visibility, and carrier payment status.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Shorten payment cycle after clean document submission.
Reduce rework from missing or inconsistent freight documents.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve carrier preference for the network.

productBricks.change: Improve proof-of-delivery validation and missing-document prompts.
Expose payment and adjustment status in carrier-facing surfaces.
Add accessorial rule explanations for detention and lumper charges.

deliveryChannels.change: Release payment status and document validation surfaces.

items.title: Operations Automation Release
items.description: Release focused on risk-ranked queues, automated status requests, and exception recovery playbooks.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce time from exception detection to recovery plan.
Shift low-value status and document work to automation.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase operational leverage without service degradation.

productBricks.change: Launch risk-ranked queue for priority accounts.
Improve exception severity scoring and recovery reason codes.
Automate routine status and missing-document follow-up.
Link automated and human messages into one shipment timeline.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated queues, playbooks, and communication timelines.
